summary: Beat Mates app testing completed. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login, home feed, stories, posts, profile, and tab bar navigation all working correctly.

minor.issue: JWT key length warning (25 bytes < 32 recommended)

integration_issues.issue: Old posts with file:// URIs cannot load on web - expected after base64 to file upload migration

issues: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>' - cosmetic React Native Web warning

action_items: Consider cleaning up old posts with file:// URIs in database
Increase JWT_SECRET length to 32+ bytes to avoid warning
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes were added to login form elements - good for future testing
File upload endpoint properly generates unique filenames
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed posts and stories for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow requires coordinate-based clicking due to React Native Web structure. Use page.mouse.click() with coordinates from getBoundingClientRect(). Tab bar has 6 icons. Posts and stories are displaying correctly with new file upload system (/api/uploads/). Old posts may have broken file:// URIs.

tested_features.file_upload: PASSED - POST /api/upload accepts multipart and returns /api/uploads/{uuid}.ext URL
tested_features.create_post: PASSED - POST /api/posts creates posts, verified in GET /api/posts
tested_features.create_story: PASSED - POST /api/stories creates stories with expiration
tested_features.stories_filtering: PASSED - GET /api/stories returns only non-expired stories
tested_features.frontend_login: PASSED - Login form accepts credentials and navigates to home
tested_features.frontend_home: PASSED - Home shows posts feed and stories bar
tested_features.frontend_tabbar: PASSED - 6 icons visible (home, create, live, reels, music, profile)
tested_features.frontend_profile: PASSED - Profile shows user info, stats, posts grid
